title: ws_events lag notice is ad-hoc JSON — not typed as DaemonEvent
description: daemon/src/ws_events.rs:72-80: when RecvError::Lagged(n), the handler sends a serde_json::json\!({"type":"events_dropped","count":n}) literal. This is not a DaemonEvent variant, so clients parsing all messages as DaemonEvent will fail to deserialize it (serde returns Err). Clients must handle the unknown type gracefully, but there is no contract for this — it's an invisible footgun. Fix: add an EventsDropped { count: u64 } variant to DaemonEvent so the type is part of the serialized contract. Alternatively, document in the wire format that events_dropped can appear outside the DaemonEvent schema.
